name: IRC_IM_FEEDBK_REQUESTS
description: This table stores all the feedback requests for a Requisition.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key for this entity.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: This field stores the status of feedback request object.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_IM_FEEDBACKS table.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the same value as of HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS.PARTICIPANT_ID column. Created with similar datatype.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B table.

columns.Name: QSTNR_VERSION_NUM
columns.Comments: Version number of the questionnaire. It identifies the version of the questionnaire if it is modified.

columns.Name: STATUS_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the feedback request as a lookup code.

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the expiry date for this feedback request.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the completed date for this feedback request when respondent submits feedback responses.

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the due date for this feedback request.

columns.Name: CANCEL_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the cancel date for this feedback request.

columns.Name: RENEW_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the renew date for this feedback request.

columns.Name: RESEND_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the resend count for this feedback request.

columns.Name: RENEW_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the renew count for this feedback request.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RATING_REQUESTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag for rating request.

columns.Name: RATING
columns.Comments: Stores the rating of the candidate as a number.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_INTERVIEW_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS table

columns.Name: ON_BEHALF_ELEVATED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the person who will respond to the feedback on behalf of the real user. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: INTRVW_REQUESTS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_IS_INTRVW_REQUESTS table.
